markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Innerwell and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, knowledge hub development, and location pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Decided to utilize existing blog structure for knowledge hub content, prioritizing speed and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Aiming for 10-15 medically reviewed articles per week, with a goal of 5 articles/week for the last two weeks of April](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Planning to draft all 23 location pages by first week of April, with subsequent focus on service+location pages](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Exploring opportunities for link acquisition through stats pages and leveraging Innerwell's internal data](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Knowledge Hub

  - [Decided to use existing blog structure for knowledge hub content instead of creating a separate section](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Will add table of contents and internal links to improve user experience and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Aiming for 10-15 medically reviewed articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Will include "medically reviewed by" attribution, but not list doctors as authors](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Considering adding 2-3 consistent authors for different content categories](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Location Pages Development

  - [Goal: Draft all 23 location pages by first week of April](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Will adjust content to focus on services offered in each location](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Considering auto-populating clinician information on location pages](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Exploring options to highlight new or underutilized clinicians](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Will create "coming soon" pages for states not yet active, potentially with lead capture](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Link Acquisition Strategy

  - [Proposing creation of stats pages for various mental health topics](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Will leverage Innerwell's internal data on patient outcomes for unique content](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Considering patient surveys to gather original data for link-worthy content](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [GrowthX team will help brainstorm data points to collect and analyze](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Content Publication Timeline

  - [April focus: 3 knowledge hub articles, then 5 articles/week for last two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Location pages to be drafted and submitted for approval](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Service+location pages to follow in mid-April](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review and implement feedback on existing content](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Innerwell to share template for location pages by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [GrowthX to proceed with generating remaining location pages](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Innerwell to share available internal statistics for link acquisition strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [GrowthX to brainstorm additional data points to collect for unique content](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Continue discussion on content strategy and timelines in communication channel](https://fathom.video/share/Pf3fxqHKsNtSimax5xdGh9tQAsxtHvkD?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
